h2f46ec09gf66fg4325gbd5eg31ddfb05b47d: There you are, I was just thinking about you. And that delicious moment we shared the other night.
h96f2fc6dg1cd1g4f71gb3f2g3c643403084b: The moment when you bit me?
hbb0d78f7g79e1g40c3g9184gb236054cab27: The very same. I've had this condition for two centuries, but truth be told? You were my first.
h8e6d2948g9fe8g4210g8a34g49e66bdbbb5c: In all these years, I've only ever fed on beasts. Drinking the blood of thinking creatures is a different thing entirely.
h685e00e8g63e8g430fg83a7g551b13ce0f25: You were delectable. And now I just can't help but wonder how the others taste.
h56e3a800gf4d8g46bbga22egb75066dd2e0b: They might not be as open to the idea as I was.
haa994a6eg7c2eg4b9cgbd3bge63d52cd95e4: Alas. It doesn't hurt to ponder the question, though.
h3fb0b247g7f37g4394g8968ge8aba88f317d: Hurt them and I'll kill you, no hesitation.
hf16f75ddg66f0g4167g8e9bg61729f81adee: You're a sweetheart, but you don't need to worry - I'm just thinking out loud.
h34327f1egdb3fg4fcbgaf70g56601ce86c65: You're looking at other necks? I'm hurt.
he6883da9gb851g4c51gaa55gb812dd356bb9: Don't worry, there's enough of me to go around. I'm a man of tremendous appetites.
h9cd40a5ag2177g4d69gb131gef416f4cc200: I don't think they'd volunteer, of course, but it doesn't make me any less curious.
h532b11b5g8219g4279ga4dagf8815b02425d: I'm all too familiar with Gale's blood, unfortunately. I can't recommend it.
he13a5ebcgc1eag48e4g8a81g134864acc140: But the gith? What in the Hells would she taste like?
h32005bd1g3978g48cegb637g4bfd8ecb06ed: Something exotic, surely? An Amnish liqueur?
h2f612f0agf647g4b10gb37bg0afff3392c87: Ohh, that sounds very appealing. I'm almost convinced.
ha6707626g1682g4836ga087gd327de635846: So - in the spirit of theoretical questions - if you had to take a bite from one of them, who would it be?
h2e765236g18b5g4861gabf2g3235a63dcfc6: Are you really asking which of our companions I'd eat?
h6c7bcb75g630eg4354gae1fgbb6aea1cb68c: I just mean a sip of their blood. No mastication required.
h64d9acc1g73e9g4e18g93adg8876d1b2ec60: What? I was only making conversation!
h1fae3a4bg36eeg4d77g83c9g4cec6f62a7f0: Honestly, you have no sense of fun.
h65e5844dgbab2g42d6g9b81g827eb659a4f5: Although the more I think on it, the hungrier I get. I'd better go find something I can actually get my teeth into.
hbfc12772gc00dg4784g9fdcg7f8152a8895c: There's nothing that tasty lurking out in the woods, but I'll make do. Sweet dreams.
h652860e1g141fg4b05g8550gc097703afead: Anything that keeps you away from our necks.
h8f8dab5ag9284g47e3g8eb0gaf28ebe3c030: Ah, a refined palate! I can't disagree.
h980175f7g5cc0g4f8dga15bg6ddd02739b0c: I could be tempted to try Lae'zel.
h242c30d2g21cag406cg9f68g9ca06c79cb47: Mmm, a meal that would put up a fight. An adventurous choice.
ha11b7ba4gd278g45f3g8a3dg14d28727dd1b: A fine choice. She is enticing.
h6ce26aaegb382g4409g9cd9g87b96a3d2085: Interesting. I always thought he'd taste a little too sweet.
hbbbb89e6gbb6bg4a02ga865g268ceeb9bdca: Delightful. She's certainly an interesting mix.
h45c7a538ge7bdg4554ga273g5989d622a1c9: Oh, I'm flattered. Who knew you had such taste?
h6cfe9a02gdcceg4eeagbefbg1ff9a9616bb2: Unfortunately, all this talk is getting me hungry. I'd better find something I can actually sink my teeth into.
h05bafaaeg5dc7g42eeg98e2g03f65edfeb51: Keep your eyes to yourself. You'll make people nervous.
h79670fa3g95f4g493fgadb1g3c8866d260e7: Could I convince you to kill someone less useful?
hb0daccd6g1adbg4b74g8486ga1560666291c: No one's getting killed, I swear. We're just two friends talking.
h9e0eeb4dg84a7g496bgad38ge6a488d9312b: I'd prefer a beer, if it's all the same to you.
hddd3dabfg6947g4b4ag934bg5cde71c8040f: Yes, heavens forbid we'd have an interesting conversation.
h7504ae61g3b2bg4d35ga420g5d3beb572c5f: Still, I am intrigued by the possibilities...
he0e4d536g7eb3g4070gac6dg1158f076b340: We are not having this conversation. Goodnight.
h7d879b49gd396g4c36gb652g047557d0f19d: But Karlach? A tiefling seasoned by hellsfire? What could she possibly taste like?
hd147faf4g1162g4422ga2d6g395934c7c2d2: Something potent, I'm sure. A smoky Waterdeep whiskey?
h9b4b97c8gc70bg437bga65dg14cdfc35f613: Ha! Fair, but not my first choice in drink.
ha18551eegc4acg493cgab20g7e38974d0133: But Shadowheart? I have no idea. How do you think our little enigma would taste?
h2cb38381g3acbg4579gb71eg726bdf847680: Something that could lay you out. Calishite Absinthe, maybe?
h0f4b4a57g5523g4b23gade0g28ef873e515a: Hard to say, but I'd guess lemonade.
h9acdb79bge4e0g4200ga996gf07db18191ac: And Wyll? Well, I'm not quite sure. How do you think he'd taste?
h1fbd241dg6869g44bdgb56cgd75a4a0460a8: He has a good heart. I'm sure he tastes sweet as any cider.
hafa5546fgaf08g4116g8c8agdda5c40aff2c: Take Gale, for example. He strikes me as someone whose blood is rich, refined like a well-aged brandy.
h1b1de854g2332g4665g94e0gdca983e154d5: Take Wyll, for example. A man of the people, very palatable, like a sweet cider.
hf553b27dg30a1g4ae9gae1cga2860b16ea4e: Take Shadowheart, for example. She strikes me as having a heavy, enigmatic flavour - vintage port on two legs.
h6a54ebc7g8c9fg4a3dg88aegc12b4fd3267d: Take Karlach, for example, her blood aged in the Hells. She's potent, like a fiery whiskey.
h7a1b33c1ga8dag4f0bgbec8gb1a85054cff4: Good. I was getting tired of them anyway.
he44244a7g00c2g4056g983egadfa466204c2: I'm not going to bite any of them. They don't seem as accommodating as you were.
hff144388g217dg464bg898ag63c4e5cda5fe: Savour the memory. It won't happen again.
h4cef5346gda42g4cd9ga5eegb69bbc09d5dd: Pity, you're tastier than you know. And you were my first.
h793eedcege25dg4021gad0ag89e446032401: I had to fight you off me!
h26825f52g239dg413agb44dg7af4d9c4b767: Yes, I'm still rather tender, now that you mention it.
hb0ddaefag2108g4546g8472g18e197ac0311: I admit, I may have been a little eager. But can you blame me? You were my first.
h66b2b703g2245g4d46g997ag8567f8521e9d: And I am deeply sorry. I was overeager - but can you blame me? You were my first.
hfbb76d40g9f30g4c40gaef2gf5899b92d404: You're lucky I didn't drive that stake into your heart.
hf6baa76ag22f3g4e39g9dfeg276ab640e812: I appreciate your restraint. It would have spoiled the mood - you were my first, after all.
h8aee5d73g8a83g4d5fgbe9bgc32f46f75d55: You know, I was just thinking about you. Remembering our little encounter in the night.
hdd7ef050g79c5g47e2gb6f9gf1a42042e4c7: When you tried to bite me?
hb491e190g3fecg473cga22eg875b101fe8fd: The very same. It obviously put me off your neck, but now I can't help but wonder how the others taste.
h0ade0312gbac2g4761gb1bbgaef76838a7f6: Not that anyone's volunteered, it's just an idle fancy.
h75d18536gbe2eg40cbg95bag1b18e98876be: I wouldn't expect any volunteers either.
hbbd26525ge21cg476cg83ceg444b788858aa: Do you have your eye on anyone in particular?
hc2c07217g24c3g4865g9506g57f88dc59432: No, that's the thing. I can't quite figure them out.
h6a826ac6gf004g4038ga4e5g1cc741f7ee1f: A dangerous 'fancy'. They're all off the menu.
h172a6c30g8986g4c9bgac3cgaccceb09be1d: A pity, they can be annoying sometimes.
h46341c1cg3684g4a50gbe32g843f5821ce54: We still need them. That doesn't stop me from wondering, of course.
hd2e100dag426cg4e63g8bf1g4813ec4d29d7: You can rest easy, I don't intend a repeat performance. Although I do wonder how the others might taste.
h8b13d9e9g371fg478dgb900ge82177886e97: You're lucky I didn't kill you.
h2e70e178g305cg407eg8545g8f590c0c96aa: And I am very grateful. It did get me thinking about the others, though. How they might taste.
